examples.text: I've been having a lot of itching, nausea, and fatigue. I've also been running a fever and losing weight. My pee is black, and I've developed a yellow rash. My stomach hurts, too.
I often feel the need to urinate and have intense urges to do so. I also feel dizzy and confused, and I have lost my sight.
I have a sore throat and a scratchy voice every morning. My throat hurts all the time, and I have bad breath. I also burp a lot.
I have itchy, red skin that sometimes flakes. My face and lips puff up, which is really annoying. I also get watery eyes and headaches when the puffing gets bad.
I have been having a lot of problems with my skin. It is constantly peeling and I have developed rashes on my arms. It is really itchy and it is making my life miserable.
